description: Short tailed, buffy wren, with streaked back and head. deep ochre buff (rather than cinnamon buff) flanks. Face rather plain in c/w Marsh WrenBehaviors: Mostly skulking about in tall wet grass. Called vigorously in response to having Sedge Wren song played, and came in closer.Call: Emphatic sweet chip, like a Lincoln's Sparrow or Fox Sparrow, with a superimposed squeaky quality.Plumage: unknown
